name: mindfullens-film-lab
description: MindfulLens Film Lab — aplikacja web (Vite, React): symulacja klisz w przeglądarce.

scripts.raw:reference:gate: npm run raw:manifest:build && npm run test:raw-reference
scripts.raw:release:check: npm run raw:reference:gate && npm run test:regression && npm run build
scripts.test:proxy: npm run test:proxy-webgpu && npm run test:proxy-downscale && npm run test:proxy-tiles
scripts.test: npm run test:regression && npm run test:crop-geometry && npm run test:deep-audit && npm run test:gh-pages-base && npm run test:static-deploy-assets && npm run test:env-example-parity && npm run test:proxy && npm run test:e2e-pointer && npm run test:fast-preview-webgl2 && npm run test:runtime-env && npm run test:vite-toolchain
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test:regression && npm run test:crop-geometry && npm run test:deep-audit && npm run test:gh-pages-base && npm run test:static-deploy-assets && npm run test:env-example-parity && npm run test:proxy && npm run test:e2e-pointer && npm run test:fast-preview-webgl2 && npm run test:runtime-env && npm run test:vite-toolchain && npm run build && npm run audit
scripts.ci:smoke: npm run ci && npm run profiles:verify-source
scripts.dev:open:poll: cross-env VITE_FILMLAB_DEV_WATCH_POLL=1 ML_DEV_OPEN=/film-lab npm run dev
scripts.dev:webgpu: cross-env VITE_FILMLAB_PROXY_GPU=1 VITE_FILMLAB_WEBGPU_PROXY=1 ML_DEV_OPEN=/film-lab npm run dev
